title: Automation to move pulse & create another pulse not working consistently
excerpt: When a pulse has a status changed to won/lost - I have an automation which moves it onto my ‘closed’ board. I also have an automation setup to create a new item in another board, but it doesnt work consistently. I wonder…

posts.author: Jack (Jack Stirk)
posts.cookedHtml:
When a pulse has a status changed to won/lost - I have an automation which moves it onto my ‘closed’ board. I also have an automation setup to create a new item in another board, but it doesnt work consistently. I wonder whether sometimes the move pulse automation fires first, and then as that pulse has moved onto a new board the create new item automation then fails?.

Would be great if you could add a time delay on move/ item creation automations so they run last. I can’t see a log either to check why its failed. I tested it 5 times and it worked on 2/5 occasions.

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jack

This sounds like a bug. Can you please write in to support@monday.com with some more information, including screenshots of your boards and automations set up on them so we can assist and investigate?

Thank you!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
